mapper.select: SELECT ID, APPLICATION_ID, MATERIAL_CODE_ID, MATERIAL_CODE, MATERIAL_NAME, SPECIFICATION_MODEL, UNIT, APPLICATION_QUANTITY, ESTIMATED_PRICE, AMOUNT, APPLICATION_STOCK_QUANTITY, FLOW_TYPE, FLOW_DIRECTION, EQUIP_IDS, EQUIP_NAMES, SUPPLY_TIME_LIMIT, SUGGESTED_BRAND, SPECIFICATION_DESC, PURCHASE_DETAIL_ID, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_BY_NAME, UPDATE_TIME FROM E_MATERIAL_APPLICATION_DETAIL WHERE APPLICATION_ID = #{applicationId} ORDER BY CREATE_TIME ASC

SELECT AD.ID, AD.APPLICATION_ID, AD.MATERIAL_CODE_ID, AD.MATERIAL_CODE, AD.MATERIAL_NAME, AD.SPECIFICATION_MODEL, AD.UNIT, AD.APPLICATION_QUANTITY, AD.ESTIMATED_PRICE, AD.AMOUNT, AD.APPLICATION_STOCK_QUANTITY, AD.FLOW_DIRECTION, AD.SUPPLY_TIME_LIMIT, AD.SUGGESTED_BRAND, AD.SPECIFICATION_DESC, AD.PURCHASE_DETAIL_ID, AD.CREATE_BY, AD.CREATE_BY_NAME, AD.CREATE_TIME, AD.UPDATE_BY, AD.UPDATE_BY_NAME, AD.UPDATE_TIME,
NVL(SUM(WID.REMAINING_QUANTITY), 0) AS STOCK_QUANTITY
0 AS STOCK_QUANTITY
FROM E_MATERIAL_APPLICATION_DETAIL AD
LEFT JOIN E_MATERIAL_WAREHOUSE_IN_DETAIL WID ON AD.MATERIAL_CODE_ID = WID.MATERIAL_ID AND WID.DEL_FLAG = 0 LEFT JOIN E_MATERIAL_WAREHOUSE_IN WI ON WID.WAREHOUSE_IN_ID = WI.ID AND WI.DEL_FLAG = 0 AND WI.WAREHOUSE_ID = #{warehouseId}
WHERE AD.APPLICATION_ID = #{applicationId} AND AD.DEL_FLAG = 0
GROUP BY AD.ID, AD.APPLICATION_ID, AD.MATERIAL_CODE_ID, AD.MATERIAL_CODE, AD.MATERIAL_NAME, AD.SPECIFICATION_MODEL, AD.UNIT, AD.APPLICATION_QUANTITY, AD.ESTIMATED_PRICE, AD.AMOUNT, AD.APPLICATION_STOCK_QUANTITY, AD.FLOW_DIRECTION, AD.SUPPLY_TIME_LIMIT, AD.SUGGESTED_BRAND, AD.SPECIFICATION_DESC, AD.PURCHASE_DETAIL_ID, AD.CREATE_BY, AD.CREATE_BY_NAME, AD.CREATE_TIME, AD.UPDATE_BY, AD.UPDATE_BY_NAME, AD.UPDATE_TIME
ORDER BY AD.CREATE_TIME ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO E_MATERIAL_APPLICATION_DETAIL ( ID, APPLICATION_ID, MATERIAL_CODE_ID, MATERIAL_CODE, MATERIAL_NAME, SPECIFICATION_MODEL, UNIT, APPLICATION_QUANTITY, ESTIMATED_PRICE, AMOUNT, APPLICATION_STOCK_QUANTITY, FLOW_TYPE, FLOW_DIRECTION, EQUIP_IDS, EQUIP_NAMES, SUPPLY_TIME_LIMIT, SUGGESTED_BRAND, SPECIFICATION_DESC, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME ) VALUES ( #{id,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{applicationId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{materialCodeId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{materialCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{materialName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{specificationModel,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{unit,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{applicationQuantity,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{estimatedPrice,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{amount,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{applicationStockQuantity,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{flowType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{flowDirection,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{equipIds,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{equipNames,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{supplyTimeLimit,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{suggestedBrand,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{specificationDesc,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{loginUserId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{loginUserName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{now,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} )
mapper.update:
UPDATE E_MATERIAL_APPLICATION_DETAIL
APPLICATION_ID = #{applicationId,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
MATERIAL_CODE_ID = #{materialCodeId,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
MATERIAL_CODE = #{materialCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
MATERIAL_NAME = #{materialName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
SPECIFICATION_MODEL = #{specificationModel,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
UNIT = #{unit,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
APPLICATION_QUANTITY = #{applicationQuantity,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
ESTIMATED_PRICE = #{estimatedPrice,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
AMOUNT = #{amount,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
APPLICATION_STOCK_QUANTITY = #{applicationStockQuantity,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
FLOW_TYPE = #{flowType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
FLOW_DIRECTION = #{flowDirection,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
EQUIP_IDS = #{equipIds,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
EQUIP_NAMES = #{equipNames,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
SUPPLY_TIME_LIMIT = #{supplyTimeLimit,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
SUGGESTED_BRAND = #{suggestedBrand,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
SPECIFICATION_DESC = #{specificationDesc,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
PURCHASE_DETAIL_ID = #{purchaseDetailId,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
PURCHASE_DETAIL_ID = NULL,
UPDATE_BY = #{loginUserId,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
UPDATE_BY_NAME = #{loginUserName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
UPDATE_TIME = #{now,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
WHERE ID = #{id}

UPDATE E_MATERIAL_APPLICATION_DETAIL
PURCHASE_DETAIL_ID = #{purchaseDetailId},
PURCHASE_DETAIL_ID = NULL,
WHERE ID = #{id}
